'''Snow slugs''' were creatures native to [[Alzoc III/Legends|Alzoc III]]. They would burrow a tunnel to the surface of the snow and open their cave-like mouths, waiting for unsuspecting prey to enter.

They appeared to possess a large amount of body heat, seeing as their trails in the snow produced large amounts of steam.

{{Creature-stub}}
